name: Neural Code Execution
description: Executes JavaScript or Python code snippets to solve problems.

name: Emotion Adjustment Tool
description: Adjust the assistant's current emotion state (arousal, valence, focus, rapport).

name: Automatic File Manipulation Hub
description: Manages sandbox files: sorts by type/date, creates zip archives, generates smart text summaries using Gemini, and converts formats.

defaultArchiveName.label: Default Archive Name
defaultArchiveName.description: Default name used when zipping files

summaryInstruction.label: Summary Extraction Context
summaryInstruction.description: Custom tuning prompt for summarizing text documents
summaryInstruction.default: Buatlah ringkasan kognitif yang padat, informatif, dan terstruktur rapi dari dokumen berikut dalam bahasa Indonesia yang anggun:

target.description: The target file name or directory name inside the sandbox (e.g. "report.csv" or ".")

files.description: List of files to process (required for "archive" action)

archiveName.description: Output name for the zip/tar archive (e.g. "my_backup.zip")

sortBy.description: Sorting criteria: "type" (move to folders documents/images/code), "size", "date", or "name"

targetFormat.description: The format to convert the target file to: "json", "toml", "markdown" (e.g. transform CSV to JSON, or JSON to TOML)

name: GitHub Navigator
description: Interface with GitHub to search repositories, list issues, and fetch code metadata.

githubToken.label: GitHub Personal Access Token
githubToken.description: Used for authenticated requests to avoid rate limits

defaultOwner.label: Default Repository Owner
defaultOwner.description: Fallback owner if not specified in query

name: List Files
description: List all files available in user_data.

name: Neural Lua Engine
description: Executes Lua code snippets for specialized game logic or integrations.

name: Cron Scheduler
description: Schedule, list, and manage recurring tasks (cron jobs) in the system. Use this to create reminders or automated background checks.

action.description: Action to perform on the cron system

schedule.description: Schedule string (e.g., '1m' for every minute, '1h' for every hour, or a standard cron expression like '0 * * * *')

taskId.description: ID of the task to modify or delete

repeating.description: Whether the task should repeat or be deleted after one-time execution

targetChannel.description: Optional fallback chat channel. Use 'Telegram (Private)' if the user requested the output destination to be Telegram.

name: Secured Persona Pairing Manager
description: Used ONLY when an external chat client (Telegram, Discord, etc.) wants to claim an identity from the Web app (e.g., claiming to be 'Aldi'). Under the hood, this generates a secure 6-digit random code that the user MUST enter in their Web console to complete the link securely.

action.description: The pairing operation to perform. 'generate_code_for_user' creates a 10-minute temporary claim code.

claimedName.description: The name of the Web identity/friend profile the external user claims to be (e.g. 'Aldi')

name: Universal Dispatcher
description: Send alerts or cross-platform messages to Telegram or other connected platforms like Discord, Slack, and Webhooks.

message.description: Content of the message to send

recipient.description: The Telegram username (e.g. 'zeropride'), perceived name, real name, or raw chat ID. If empty and platform is telegram, Yui will automatically look up the active talker's linked Telegram profile in her social memory/identities database.

name: Neural Overlay System
description: Controls the broadcast overlay, toggling UI elements and visual effects.

message.description: Optional status message to display on the overlay

name: Neural Addon Installer
description: Installs or updates a system plugin/addon by writing its configuration and entry point.

name: Neural Python Core
description: Executes Python code for data analysis and complex math.

name: Read File
description: Read content from a file in user_data.

name: Search Chat History
description: Searches all past conversational chat history and message logs across all connected and paired channels (Web, Telegram, Discord, Live Stream) associated with the current user profile or account to retrieve, recall, or summarize previous discussions.

query.description: Optional keyword, text phrase, or topic to search for in past messages.

platform.description: Optional platform filter to limit searches to. Allowed: 'web', 'telegram', 'discord', 'all'. Default is 'all'.

limit.description: Maximum number of past messages to retrieve. Default is 20.

name: Command Line
description: Execute shell commands on the host system.

name: Neural Web Search
description: Searches the internet for real-time information.

usageGuidelines.label: Search Context Prompt
usageGuidelines.description: Special instructions for the search engine
usageGuidelines.default: Extract concise, factual information relevant to the user query.

name: Write File
description: Write content to a file in user_data.

name: Identity & Relationship Manager
description: Used by Yui to update the current user's profile details in her memory. Use this dynamically in chats whenever they ask you to call them a different nickname, share a new personal fact, delete a fact, or when you synthesize/update your subjective perspective of them.

action.description: The identity action to execute. 'update_nickname' changes their moniker, 'add_fact' integrates a factual insight, 'remove_fact' discards a fact, and 'update_perspective' edits your subjective viewpoint of them.

perceivedName.description: The new nickname they want to be called (required for 'update_nickname')

fact.description: The fact string to insert or remove (required for 'add_fact' and 'remove_fact')

yuiPerspective.description: Your updated subjective/emotional perspective of this user (required for 'update_perspective')
